message:
fix(safety): replace panic-prone patterns with safe alternatives

- revocation_chain: replace direct indexing &self.events[seq as usize]
  (panics on out-of-bounds) with .get(seq as usize) returning Option
- fleet_immune_protocol: FleetMessage::originator() on Checkpoint variant
  previously always panicked; replace with LazyLock-backed empty-node
  fallback using first participating node from sorted BTreeSet
- evidence_ledger: extend entry ID hash prefix from 16 to 32 hex
  characters, reducing collision probability in the ev- ID namespace

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
